lastMessageBody: Hi Judith, my name is Brand with MGO Data LLC in Cincinnati. I noticed your property on Starcrest Dr has a foreclosure filing, and the auction is set for April 8th. I buy properties directly from homeowners for cash, and I may be able to help you avoid the auction and walk away clean. Would you be open to a brief conversation? You can reach me at (513) 850-6496. - Brand

Hi, this is Brand with MGO Data LLC in Cincinnati. I'm reaching out about the property at 7264 Swirlwood Ln. I understand there's a foreclosure proceeding through TruPartner Credit Union with an auction date of April 8th. I work with homeowners in situations like this, and I wanted to make sure you know about all the options available before that date. There's no cost or obligation to have a conversation. If you'd like to talk through your choices, you can reach me at (513) 850-6496. - Brand

Hi William, my name is Brand with MGO Data LLC here in Cincinnati. I noticed your property on St Martins Pl has a foreclosure filing through Union Home Mortgage. You've been in that home over 20 years and built up significant equity. If it goes to auction on April 8th, you risk losing all of it. I buy properties directly and can get you a fair cash offer before that date. No fees, no pressure. Would you be open to a quick call? (513) 850-6496 - Brand

Hi Faith, my name is Brand. I work with a local real estate group here in Cincinnati. I noticed your property on Sundale Ave may be heading to auction on April 8th. I wanted to reach out because we might be able to help you avoid that and walk away with cash in hand. No pressure, no fees from you. Would you be open to a quick conversation this week? - Brand, MGO Data LLC
